calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Continued To Sep-17-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar May-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs N. ALDRIDGE, SEBASTOPOL INDUSTRIAL PARK LLC, HIGHWAY PARTNERS LLC's Motion For Change Of Venue is granted. The case is transferred to Sonoma County. Defendants have met their burden in showing that venue is not proper in San Francisco under any statutory grounds. The moving papers establish that the contracts attached to the complaint were entered into and to be performed in Sonoma County. (Complaint, Ex. C.) Defendants presented evidence in reply to rebut Plaintiff's argument that Defendant N. Barnard Aldridge resides in San Francisco. (Declaration of N. Bernard Aldridge, par. 5.) Defendants also presented evidence in reply to rebut Plaintiff's argument that the entity defendants are located in San Francisco. (Declaration of Jeffrey S. Lyons, Exs. A-C.) The evidence establishes that all Defendants reside or have their principal place of business in Sonoma County. Defendants' request for an award of fees pursuant to CCP sec. 396b(b) is denied. Defendants do not address this request in their memorandum of points and authorities. Further, no evidence is presented as to "(1) whether an offer to stipulate to change of venue was reasonably made and rejected, and (2) whether the motion or selection of venue was made in good faith given the facts and law the party making the motion or selecting the venue knew or should have known." (CCP 396b(b).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.
